_doc: 2_configs is the unified-manifest consolidator. Mirrors cloud's `cloud-data` pattern: src/ collects every per-project build.json + linktree's link data via symlinks; dist/ emits aggregated `front-data-*.json` files that downstream consumers (CI, reports, the linktree home page itself) can read as the SINGLE source of truth for the repo.
name: 2_configs

consolidate._doc: Outputs declared declaratively. The build.sh script reads this section and emits one file per output. Each output's `from` is a glob of symlinks under src/.

outputs.description: Per-project build.json — name, framework, port, build steps, deploy section.
Linktree's 3 box JSONs (personal-profiles, personal-tools, professional-profiles) merged + every link flattened with full {section, slide, column, label, url, icon}.
Project topology: derived from build.json paths — {category, slug, path, port, framework, deploy_name}.
